overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a green cloak exploring a grand Gothic-style interior. The character approaches a seated figure near a piano, then ascends an ornate spiral staircase to an upper level with stone corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with piano and spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: walking across the wooden floor toward a seated figure near the grand piano

notable_agents.action: seated on a bench near the piano, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: dark wooden grand piano with matching bench
ornate wrought iron spiral staircase with wooden steps
tall gothic arched windows with decorative stone tracery
large circular patterned rug under the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious grand hall with polished wooden floors and high Gothic windows. A grand piano sits to the left where an NPC is seated, while an ornate spiral staircase dominates the center of the room.

events.description: character begins ascending the spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: circling around the base of the spiral staircase and beginning to climb the steps

entered.detail: ornate black wrought iron railing along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the piano area and begins ascending the spiral staircase. The wrought iron railing comes into view as the character circles the central column of the staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase upper section with domed ceiling

events.description: elaborate domed ceiling with skylight comes into view above

agents.ego_description: climbing the upper portion of the spiral staircase, revealing the ornate ceiling architecture

entered.detail: intricate vaulted ceiling with painted blue details and central skylight
brass chandelier hanging from the domed ceiling

segments.scene_description: Continuing upward, the character reveals an elaborate domed ceiling with intricate patterns and a hanging brass chandelier. The space becomes more enclosed as the staircase winds tighter toward the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor with diamond-paned windows

events.description: exits the grand hall into a narrow stone corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow stone corridor toward a wooden door at the end

entered.detail: grey stone block walls with narrow diamond-paned windows
tall narrow windows with diamond lattice pattern
white wooden door with brass handle at corridor end

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the staircase into a narrow stone corridor with grey block walls and diamond-paned windows. The character approaches a white wooden door at the end of the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, light-filled grand hall into the confined stone corridors of an upper level. It begins with the character walking across polished wooden floors past a grand piano and a seated figure, moving toward a central ornate spiral staircase. As the character begins the ascent, the view shifts to the wrought iron railings and the central column before opening upward to reveal an intricate domed ceiling and a hanging brass chandelier. The space then becomes increasingly enclosed as the staircase winds tighter, finally emerging into a narrow passage of grey stone blocks and diamond-paned windows that leads toward a white wooden door.
